title: Senior C++ Systems Engineer
description:
We are looking for a Senior C++ Systems Engineer to join our trading systems team in New York. The ideal candidate will have strong experience with C++17/20, low-latency systems programming, and lock-free data structures.

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement high-performance trading infrastructure
- Optimize critical path code for minimal latency
- Work with FPGA teams on co-design of trading systems
- Develop and maintain order management systems

Requirements:
- 5+ years of C++ development experience
- Deep understanding of memory management, STL, and template metaprogramming
- Experience with lock-free programming and NUMA architectures
- Strong knowledge of Linux kernel internals
- Experience with TCP/IP networking at scale
- Excellent problem-solving skills
priority_reason: Requires C++17/20, lock-free programming, low-latency systems — perfect tier 1 match.
